title: デビュー戦の後に・最初のご褒美

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to protect me from any embarrassment,
Super Creek finishes her debut with a majestic
run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides to take on the Classics, choosing to
run in the Sumire Stakes next because of its
adorable name.
